Description: Hardcoded absolute path to local git workspace in config/code/scripts
Author: Cason Konzer
Message:
ci: finalize gitleaks config, workflow, and deploy script

Add 555-area-code and synthetic test number entries to the global
allowlist so crew-chief/shock-relay fixtures stop triggering false
positives. Add documentation path exclusions to the workspace-path rule
so AGENTS.md/README/CHANGELOG commits don't flag. Update secret-scan.yml
to pass --baseline-path on scheduled full-history runs. Extend the deploy
script to generate and commit .gitleaks-baseline.json per repo. Add
traction-control baseline (1 known finding in deleted systemd file).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Hardcoded absolute path to local git workspace in config/code/scripts
Author: Cason Konzer
Message:
feat: add archility weekly systemd service and timer

- scripts/archility-weekly.sh: discovers all portfolio repos (maxdepth 4,
  skips archive-repos/), runs archility audit across all, then archility
  render per-repo; logs timestamped to ~/.local/share/archility-weekly/
  with a 'latest.log' symlink
- systemd/archility-weekly.service: oneshot user service referencing the script
- systemd/archility-weekly.timer: fires every Sunday at 02:00, Persistent=true
  so missed runs catch up within 1 h of next boot

Install with:
  cp systemd/* ~/.config/systemd/user/
  systemctl --user daemon-reload
  systemctl --user enable --now archility-weekly.timer

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
